name: @kolm/multimodal-redact-audio-worker
description: Isolated kolm multimodal AUDIO voiceprint scrub. Spawns an external voiceprint-anonymizer command (default: pyannote-audio-redact on PATH or VOICEPRINT_REDACT_CMD env override) to anonymize the speaker's voiceprint while preserving content. Heavy Python deps (pyannote.audio, torch, speaker embedding models) live OUTSIDE this Node package — root kolm install stays light. When the external redactor is missing the worker emits an honest install_hint envelope; never silently claims it scrubbed a voiceprint it could not modify.

python_redactor.note: Production voiceprint anonymization requires an external command. Default search: $VOICEPRINT_REDACT_CMD env override, then `pyannote-audio-redact` on PATH, then `~/.kolm/scripts/voiceprint-redact.py` (invoked via python3). The command MUST accept --input <wav> --output <wav> [--strength 0..1] and emit one JSON line on stdout. Without one the worker returns {ok:false, install_hint, redacted_audio:null} so the caller knows what's missing.

external.python_requirements: pyannote.audio>=3.1.0, torch>=2.0.0 (CPU or CUDA), soundfile, scipy
